node.title: Need Recommendations for Low-Level Design (LLD) Learning Resources

article.title: Need Recommendations for Low-Level Design (LLD) Learning Resources
article.content:
Hi everyone,
I’ve given interviews at companies like Meta and Uber, but I couldn’t make it through mainly due to my weak Low-Level Design (LLD) skills.
Could anyone please suggest some good LLD courses or resources that focus on real-world design problems and best practices?

post.content:
Sharing some good LLD Resources:-

1. https://blog.gagan93.me/low-level-design-interviews
2. https://refactoring.guru/design-patterns
3. https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQEaRBV9gAFvzp6XhcNFpk1WdOcyVo9qT
4. https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL12BCqE-Lp650Cg6FZW7SoZwN8Rw1WJI7
5. https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6W8uoQQ2c61X_9e6Net0WdYZidm7zooW
6. https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL564gOx0bCLqTolRIHIsR2JPv11w8LESW

I am not saying to complete all of these, we have to figure out which one suits the best. I personally combine these only based on question I want to solve. You have to explore these by yourself to figure out what works for you!
You can follow this sheet -> https://algomaster.io/learn/lld
Shreyansh Jain LLD playlist on YT
Can I get referral. I think I have very good DSA skill but not getting the chance to sit in these companies.
You can try the lld playlist of codewitharyan
please can any share youtube resources as well.
